overall.description: Stationary view of the Wapiti Reservation entrance from Red Dead Redemption 2, featuring traditional teepees in a forest clearing. The clip captures a dynamic weather transition from bright midday sunlight to overcast conditions, with smoke rising from campfires visible throughout the encampment.

scene_state.functional_zone: Native American reservation entrance with teepee encampment

agents.ego_description: standing stationary at the reservation entrance, observing the teepee encampment and surrounding forest

entered.detail: weathered wooden sign with white painted text reading WAPITI RESERVATION
group of traditional canvas teepees with smoke rising from campfire
large conical teepee with weathered beige canvas
additional teepees visible in the background of the clearing
dense pine trees forming the forest perimeter behind the encampment

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of the Wapiti Reservation entrance on a bright sunny day. The wooden sign stands prominently in the foreground while traditional teepees are arranged throughout the clearing. Smoke rises from a campfire in the left teepee cluster, and tall pine trees form a dense backdrop under a blue sky with scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: Native American reservation under overcast sky

events.description: clouds cover the sun causing a significant shift from bright direct sunlight to diffused overcast lighting

agents.ego_description: remaining stationary as the weather changes, continuing to observe the reservation entrance

segments.scene_description: The reservation scene continues under increasingly overcast conditions as clouds obscure the sun. The lighting shifts from warm and direct to cool and diffused, casting the teepees and forest in softer shadows. The wooden sign and encampment remain unchanged as the weather transition completes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary view of the Wapiti Reservation entrance as a bright, sunny midday atmosphere gradually transforms into a cool, overcast day. It begins with a wooden sign standing prominently in the foreground, overlooking traditional teepees arranged in a clearing beneath a blue sky with scattered clouds. As the scene progresses, smoke continues to rise from a campfire in the left teepee cluster while the surrounding dense pine forest remains still. The lighting then shifts from warm and direct to cool and diffused as clouds steadily obscure the sun, casting the encampment and the forest in softer shadows. The shot concludes with the weather transition complete, leaving the reservation under a muted, gray sky.
